heading: Retrieve Specific IP Addresses for Outbound Firewall Rules
body:
If your application environment requires configuring outbound firewall rules
using specific IP addresses, you can retrieve a list of IP addresses associated
with all clusters and services in your project using the
[Return All IP Addresses for One Project](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-getgroupipaddresses)
API endpoint.

> **Note:** These IP addresses are dynamic and subject to frequent changes.
> Use this option only if your application can programmatically
> integrate these IP addresses into your orchestration automation,
> enabling frequent updates to your firewall rules.
